code:
export const products = [{
  id: 1,
  name: "Turkish Evil Eye Bracelet",
  category: "Evil Eye",
  price: 1299,
  originalPrice: 1899,
  badge: "Bestseller",
  description: "Handcrafted glass evil eye bracelet to ward off negative energies and bring protection.",
  longDescription: "Each bead is hand-blown using traditional Turkish techniques. The deep blue eye center is believed to reflect evil back to its source, shielding the wearer from harm. Adjustable thread ensures a perfect fit.",
  features: ["Hand-blown glass beads", "Adjustable cord", "Gold-plated charm", "Energised & blessed"],
  emoji: "🧿",
  color: "#3b82f6",
  bg: "#eff6ff"
}, {
  id: 2,
  name: "5-Mukhi Rudraksha Mala",
  category: "Rudraksha",
  price: 2499,
  originalPrice: 3200,
  badge: "Sacred",
  description: "108-bead mala of genuine 5-faced Rudraksha seeds, ruled by Lord Shiva, for calm and clarity.",
  longDescription: "Sourced directly from Nepal, each Rudraksha bead is hand-selected for authentic 5-face (mukhi) markings. Traditionally worn to reduce stress and enhance meditation. Strung on silk thread with a gold-capped guru bead.",
  features: ["108 genuine beads", "Nepal sourced", "Silk thread", "Comes with certificate"],
  emoji: "📿",
  color: "#92400e",
  bg: "#fef3c7"
}, {
  id: 3,
  name: "Nazar Evil Eye Wall Hanging",
  category: "Evil Eye",
  price: 899,
  originalPrice: 1299,
  badge: "Home Decor",
  description: "Large ceramic evil eye to hang at your entrance and protect your home from negative energy.",
  longDescription: "A stunning 30cm hand-painted ceramic piece with layered concentric blue eyes. Hang at the entrance of your home, office, or sacred space. Each piece is unique due to hand-painting — slight variations make it truly one of a kind.",
  features: ["30cm diameter", "Hand-painted ceramic", "Ready-to-hang", "Indoor/outdoor safe"],
  emoji: "🔵",
  color: "#1d4ed8",
  bg: "#dbeafe"
}, {
  id: 4,
  name: "Ganesh Rudraksha Pendant",
  category: "Rudraksha",
  price: 1799,
  originalPrice: 2499,
  badge: "New",
  description: "Sterling silver Ganesha pendant set with a single 1-mukhi Rudraksha for success and new beginnings.",
  longDescription: "A masterpiece of devotional jewellery. The 92.5 sterling silver Ganesha frame is handcrafted by artisans in Jaipur and holds a rare single-faced Rudraksha bead at its centre — the most powerful and auspicious of all Rudrakshas.",
  features: ["925 Sterling silver", "1-Mukhi Rudraksha", "Jaipur handcraft", "Gift box included"],
  emoji: "🕉️",
  color: "#7c3aed",
  bg: "#f5f3ff"
}, {
  id: 5,
  name: "Evil Eye Gold Ring",
  category: "Evil Eye",
  price: 2199,
  originalPrice: 2900,
  badge: null,
  description: "Delicate 18k gold-plated adjustable ring with a hand-set evil eye stone centre.",
  longDescription: "Minimalist and wearable, this ring blends everyday fashion with protective symbolism. The centre evil eye stone is hand-set in a gold-plated bezel setting. Adjustable band fits sizes 5–10.",
  features: ["18k gold-plated brass", "Hand-set stone", "Adjustable band", "Anti-tarnish coated"],
  emoji: "💍",
  color: "#b45309",
  bg: "#fef9ee"
}, {
  id: 6,
  name: "7-Chakra Rudraksha Set",
  category: "Rudraksha",
  price: 3499,
  originalPrice: 4500,
  badge: "Bundle",
  description: "A curated set of 7 Rudraksha beads, one for each chakra, with a velvet pouch and guide.",
  longDescription: "Each of the 7 beads in this set corresponds to a specific chakra and mukhi face — from the root chakra (1-Mukhi) to the crown (7-Mukhi). Comes with a laminated reference guide explaining placement, mantra, and benefits for each bead.",
  features: ["7 authentic beads", "Chakra guide included", "Velvet pouch", "Puja-blessed"],
  emoji: "✨",
  color: "#059669",
  bg: "#ecfdf5"
}];
export const categories = ["All", "Evil Eye", "Rudraksha"];
